steps.title: Set up the perimeter equation
steps.content: Let the unknown third side be $x$. The perimeter is the sum of all three sides: $$24 + 24 + x = 83$$.

steps.title: Solve for the third side
steps.content:
Combine like terms on the left: $$48 + x = 83.$$
Subtract 48 from both sides: $$x = 83 - 48 = 35.$$
The answer is 35.
